title: Dates should be formatted correctly when using pandas.to_datetime with dayfirst or yearfirst arguments
description: Enforces proper formatting of dates when using the dayfirst or yearfirst arguments with pandas.to_datetime.
message: Incorrect date format when using dayfirst or yearfirst with pandas.to_datetime.
impact: Misleading dates can cause incorrect data analysis and decision-making.
recommendation: Format dates correctly according to the expected format.
why_is_this_an_issue: Incorrect date formatting can lead to misinterpretation of data.
how_to_fix: Format dates correctly according to the expected format.
